_meta.description: Individual executive and donor records for personal FEC contribution tracking. Separate from corporate PAC data in entities.json.
_meta.source: FEC bulk individual contributions (by_date files) for donor ranking, with entity matching and any existing Schedule A API hydration preserved when available.
_meta.methodology: Ranked from FEC bulk individual-contribution files by normalized donor key across selected cycles; people-first matching checks donor names, common names, and exact employer aliases before preserving any existing hydrated Schedule A summaries, aliases, and entity links.
